rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.6: Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (comparative claims without supporting evidence).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (section ordering is inverted).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (inconsistency between described pipeline and reported configuration).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
